name: ENTERGY ARKANSAS, LLC
business: Entergy Arkansas sells electric power to retail customers in portions of Arkansas. It holds exclusive franchises to provide electric service in approximately 308 incorporated cities and towns. As of December 31, 2025, it served 738,000 electric customers.

catalysts.sentence: As part of the settlement of the 2023 formula rate plan proceeding, Entergy Arkansas agreed to file its next base rate case no later than February 27, 2026.
